creator: peter@vereshagin.org
text:
Any time of year you can find me here bug-followup.

This is to note that I successfully compiled and ran xvidcap patched this way:
===
--- src/main.c.orig     2009-05-26 03:52:55.198022652 +0500
+++ src/main.c  2009-05-26 01:12:45.670052478 +0500
@@ -934,7 +934,7 @@
     resultCode = xvc_ui_run();
 
 #ifdef USE_FFMPEG
-    av_free_static();
+    //av_free_static();
 #endif
 
     return (resultCode);
===

I found that av_free_static is called automatically on ffmpeg unlinking, here:
http://lists.mplayerhq.hu/pipermail/ffmpeg-devel/2005-August/003275.html
http://lists.mplayerhq.hu/pipermail/ffmpeg-devel/2005-August/003324.html

xvidcap seem to work for me, at least I recorded screencast and played it. But it coredumps on stop recording, so this can be a dirty solution. Here is the last from my kdump:
===
 89993 xvidcap  RET   write 37/0x25
 89993 xvidcap  CALL  gettimeofday(0xbf9fef64,0)
 89993 xvidcap  RET   gettimeofday 0
 89993 xvidcap  CALL  write(0x5,0x28a12896,0x1)
 89993 xvidcap  GIO   fd 5 wrote 1 byte
       "A"
 89993 xvidcap  RET   write 1
 89993 xvidcap  CALL  gettimeofday(0xbf9fef28,0)
 89993 xvidcap  RET   gettimeofday 0
 89993 xvidcap  CALL  nanosleep(0xbf9fef48,0)
 89993 xvidcap  CALL  poll(0x2ad94980,0x2,0)
 89993 xvidcap  RET   poll 1
 89993 xvidcap  CALL  read(0x4,0xbfbfe58b,0x1)
 89993 xvidcap  GIO   fd 4 read 1 byte
       "A"
 89993 xvidcap  RET   read 1
 89993 xvidcap  CALL  read(0x3,0x2ac35028,0x1000)
 89993 xvidcap  RET   read -1 errno 35 Resource temporarily unavailable
 89993 xvidcap  CALL  poll(0x2ad94980,0x2,0)
 89993 xvidcap  RET   poll 0
 89993 xvidcap  CALL  select(0x4,0xbfbfe2fc,0xbfbfe27c,0,0)
 89993 xvidcap  RET   select 1
 89993 xvidcap  CALL  writev(0x3,0xbfbfe3dc,0x1)
 89993 xvidcap  GIO   fd 3 wrote 716 bytes
 89993 xvidcap  RET   writev 716/0x2cc
 89993 xvidcap  CALL  read(0x3,0x2ac35028,0x1000)
 89993 xvidcap  GIO   fd 3 read 32 bytes
       0x0000 0501 194b f02d 4710 8300 0000 3a00 2003 0000 0000 5002 3e01 1600 1200 1001 0100       |...K.-G.....:. .....P.>.........|

 89993 xvidcap  RET   read 32/0x20
 89993 xvidcap  CALL  read(0x3,0x2ac35028,0x1000)
 89993 xvidcap  RET   read -1 errno 35 Resource temporarily unavailable
 89993 xvidcap  CALL  poll(0x2ad94980,0x2,0)
 89993 xvidcap  RET   poll 0
 89993 xvidcap  CALL  thr_kill(0x187dc,SIGALRM)
 89993 xvidcap  RET   nanosleep -1 errno 4 Interrupted system call
 89993 xvidcap  PSIG  SIGALRM caught handler=0x8064d10 mask=0x0 code=0x0
 89993 xvidcap  CALL  sigaction(SIGALRM,0xbf9febd8,0xbf9febc0)
 89993 xvidcap  RET   sigaction 0
 89993 xvidcap  CALL  sigreturn(0xbf9fec20)
 89993 xvidcap  RET   sigreturn JUSTRETURN
 89993 xvidcap  CALL  shmdt(0x2ba5a000)
 89993 xvidcap  RET   shmdt 0
 89993 xvidcap  CALL  shmctl(0x35e0010,IPC_RMID,0)
 89993 xvidcap  RET   shmctl 0
 89993 xvidcap  CALL  lseek(0x8,0x34,SEEK_SET,0)
 89993 xvidcap  RET   lseek 52/0x34
 89993 xvidcap  CALL  write(0x8,0x2bb83010,0x9)
 89993 xvidcap  GIO   fd 8 wrote 9 bytes
       "\0@
        fffffg"
 89993 xvidcap  RET   write 9
 89993 xvidcap  CALL  lseek(0x8,0xab,SEEK_SET,0)
 89993 xvidcap  RET   lseek 171/0xab
 89993 xvidcap  CALL  write(0x8,0x2bb83010,0x9)
 89993 xvidcap  GIO   fd 8 wrote 9 bytes
       0x0000 0040 e9e6 0000 0000 00                                                                |.@.......|

 89993 xvidcap  RET   write 9
 89993 xvidcap  CALL  lseek(0x8,0xcf30,SEEK_SET,0)
 89993 xvidcap  RET   lseek 53040/0xcf30
 89993 xvidcap  PSIG  SIGSEGV SIG_DFL
 89993 xvidcap  RET   thr_kill 0
 89993 xvidcap  NAMI  "/tmp/xvidcap.core"
===

It works only for flv format, with msmpeg4-divx it coredumps on start recording. :-)

This is Gentoo patch that confirms my guess:
http://ftp15.us.freebsd.org/pub/gentoo-portage/x11-misc/xvidcap/files/xvidcap-1.1.7-ffmpeg-trellis.patch

But we must sure it is not a bug to be fixed by xvidcap's author, before we will make such a patch for this port.

73! Peter
--
